Quest: A New Hope

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Hi, I’m Jane. Someone named Tomas should have talked to you about me.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Oh yeah, He did mention someone named Jane.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
And did he tell you why I wanted to see you?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
He did.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
I have to say, what happened to you was not fair.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
And people say I'm the criminal.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Do you know who the real criminal is?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
It’s all those big corporations.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
I try to stay under the radar so that the law doesn't catch up with me.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
But they don't even care about the law.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
They have enough politicians in their pocket to make whatever law they want.
\c[3]Jane:\c[23] He went into a rant against big corporations. Tomas was right, and he doesn't like them very much.
\c[23]He also realized that he had been talking for a long time.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Sorry for all the rambling. I just got a bit emotional.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
It’s okay. And you are right about everything you said.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
So, what can I do for you, Miss Jane?
\c[3]Jane:\c[23] I thought he knew why exactly I am here!

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Umm...What exactly did Tomas tell you about me?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Well, he told me you were fired and blacklisted by your former employers and asked if I am willing to help you.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
I knew his father, so I told him I would see what I could do for you.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
But first, I need to know what kind of help you want from me?
\c[3]Jane:\c[23] This is not what I was expecting. The way Tomas was talking, I got the impression that Mr. Victor was ready to help me take down the GRN Corps.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Umm, I was hoping you might be able to help me take down the GRN Corps.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Taking down a multi-billion bucks corporation! Ha ha ha.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
As much as I despise them, it's not a very easy thing to do.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Umm, well, I guess I should go then.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Giving up so easily?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Sorry?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
I said, Taking down a multi-billion bucks corporation is not easy, but I never said it's impossible.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
But first, you must convince me it's worth doing.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Because I have to invest a lot of my resources into it.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Not to mention, I will put myself and my entire business at risk.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
So tell me, why should I help you?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Umm, because it's the right thing to do?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Ha ha, honey, did you forget you are talking to a criminal?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
You have to do better than that.
\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Think Jane, think. What can I tell him to change his mind.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Mr. Victor, you are a very wealthy man, right?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Well, I can't say how much money I have for legal reasons, but I have done pretty well for myself.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
And despite having all the money, you set up your office here, in the slum.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
That's because my line of work requires it.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah, but still, you don't have to come here every day.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
You could easily run your business from your house. Which I assume is located in a very rich part of the city.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
You assumed correct.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
And yet, you come here every day, in that backward part of the town.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I also know that you always try to help the people who live here.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
So I think you care about the people of the slum.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Yes I do. Because I grew up here. So I know the struggle they go through every day.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
But get to the point. You don't need to tell me my own backstory.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well, many people that work in various GRN Corps factories are from this part of the city.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
But those factories' working conditions are very bad. They don't meet the standard set by the government.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
As a result, many of the workers develop serious illnesses.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
This is one of the many reasons I tried to expose them.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Why should I believe you? How do I know You are not just trying to manipulate me?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Talk to the people who work there, then. You will see I'm telling the truth.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
There is no need. I already knew about it. I just wanted to hear it from your mouth.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
And yes, you are right about what you said earlier.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
I do care about those people.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
They have no one to look after them. They get bullied by everyone in society.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
And I intend to do something about it.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
But Miss Jane, you are not one of these people. You are someone who looks down at them.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
That’s not true. I have nothing against poor people.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
The fact that you mention them as "Poor people" says otherwise.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
But anyway, I'm going after the GRN. As a matter of fact, I have already started to collect information about some of their top executives.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
But I'm not doing it for you. I don't know you and don't care about you.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
I'm doing it for my people, to protect them.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
But you can be a part of this.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
That is if you can prove yourself to me.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
What do you mean?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
I mean, I need to know, you have what it takes to do what needs to be done.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I hope you don't want me to do something illegal?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Obviously, I want you to do something illegal. Who do you think I am? A saint?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I...I don't think I'm cut out for that.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Let me give you a life lesson.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
If you want to take out a big evil corporation, you can't do it by staying on the righteous path.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
We are talking about a corporation that shapes the law to its liking.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
You can't win against them by playing fair.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
You have to play dirty. But whether or not you get dirty in the process depends on the decisions you make along the way.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
So, what will it be?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Are you brave enough to take the risk, or do you wanna go back to your dull and boring life, living the life of a coward.
\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Why the hell not! I am already on rock bottom anyway.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Alright. What do you want me to do?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Did you think it through? Because there is no turning back.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah, I am.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Well then. Let's start small, shall we?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
I want you to meet someone. His name is \c[4]T-Dog\c[0], and he lives in a nearby \c[13]Rundown Apartment\c[0] buliding.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
And I think his apartment number is \c[13]1-2\c[0].

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
I will tell him you are coming.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
He will explain what you need to do.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Alright. I guess I'll see you later then.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I finished what T-Dog asked me to do.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
I know. I also know how you handled a certain situation.
(\c[23]She realized what situation he was talking about. She was so ashamed that she couldn't look at him.\c[0])

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
There is no need to be ashamed. It's nice to see you are not some uptight girl.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
In our business, it can be very handy.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I'm not a slut.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
I'm not saying you are. I'm saying, instead of getting scared, you handled that situation very well.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Which means, you'll do whatever it takes to achieve your goal.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
You need this type of attitude if you are to take down GRN Corps.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I finished what T-Dog asked me to do.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
I know. I also know how you handled a certain situation.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
It was very smart how you handled it.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Thanks.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Now that I've done what you asked me to do, will you help me with my problem?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Not so fast. It was just one job. You still have a long way to go before I consider doing anything for you.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
But I thought you were already working on a plan to take down GRN?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
I am. But if you want to be a part of this plan, you first need to earn my trust.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well then, what else do I need to do for that?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
For now, you will work for T-Dog. He will let you know what kinds of work he has for you.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Talk to him \c[13]tomorrow\c[0].

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Once you have done enough work for him and he is satisfied with your performance, we will move into the next part.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Keep working for him until then.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] It's going to be more difficult than I thought.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] I hope I don't regret it later.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Alright. I'll be going then.
Quest: Gangster Apprentice_Day two

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
You wanted to see me?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Yeah, it’s been a while since the last time we talked.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah, I suppose.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
And from what I have heard till then, you have done an excellent job.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
I would even say that you exceed my expectations.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well, I tried to do the best I could.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Clearly.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
If you wanted to talk to me, I guess it has something to do with my most recent work?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
You are right. I didn’t expect you to manage it so well.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
So when T-Dog gave me the report, it took me by surprise.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
So he told you the truth, huh? I thought he would take all the credit for himself.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
That’s because you don’t know what kind of person I truly am.
(\c[23]He said sharply, implying no one would dare lie to him.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Sometimes I forget he is a mob boss, Scary!\c[0])
(\c[23]But he immediately went back to being casual.\c[0])

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
So anyway, how did you convince that cop?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Haven’t T-Dog told you about that?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
He did. But I want to hear it from you.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] He probably wants to double check.\c[0])
\>Jane explained about how she persuaded him to let go
\>of his demands.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Hmm, impressive. You have done quite a bit of detective work.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
I am really glad to have you in my team.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
My men are reliable and loyal. But most of them are meat headed.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
It’s nice to have someone as smart as you for a change.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Umm, thanks.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
I have also heard that you have given the cop some special service?
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] So T-Dog even told him about that!\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Umm, yeah.
(\c[23]She replied a little shamefully.\c[0])

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Is there any particular reason behind that?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Because, from what you told me, I have an impression that you didn’t need to do that.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well, I thought it would be nice to build a good relationship with a cop.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
In case, you know, If I am ever in trouble in the future...

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Hmm...

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Jane, tell me, why didn't I take care of that cop by myself?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
If I wanted, I could have settled it with just one phone call.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] That’s true. He probably knows many powerful and well-connected people.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] He could have easily solved it if he wanted to.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I do not know.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
That’s because you don’t use a cannon to kill a mosquito.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
My men should be able to handle such trivial matters without my help.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Although, it looks like some of them can’t even do that, considering you did someone else’s job.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Maybe I have become too soft. I have to do something about that.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
But anyway, you get the point I am trying to make, right?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I think so. You are saying I shouldn’t put more effort than necessity.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Yeah, something like that.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Your body is one of your biggest assets.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
You should only use it when it’s absolutely necessary. Or it will lose its value.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I...I will keep it in mind.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] I feel like I just got scolded for acting like a slut.\c[0])

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Don’t get me wrong, I am not shaming you or anything.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
I just want you to be aware of your true value.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
But that aside, your open-mindedness is a big plus, if you want to be more involved with my world.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
No need to thank me, since I am the one benefiting from it.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Your resourcefulness is a big plus, if you want to be more involved with my world.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I appreciate that you have such a high hope for me, but I hope you didn’t forget about my true intention.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
The reason I started working for you in the first place.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Of course not. In fact, this is why I called you here today.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
I take it you are still adamant about taking revenge on your ex-employer?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yes, I am.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Alright then. In that case, the first thing we need to do is gather some information.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
What kind of information?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Anything that we can use to hurt them.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
And I have a man for this kind of work.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
He is some kind of computer hacker, goes by the name “Mr. Robot”.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Mr. Robot?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Yeah, a fake name, most likely.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
So, this is my next task, right? You want me to work with him?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Yeah. But first, you need to negotiate with him for his service.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Negotiate with him? But I thought he is already working for you?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
I never said that. He is...umm...more like a freelancer, that I use from time to time, if I need to collect some information on something.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Are you sure I should be the one doing that?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Of course. You have already proven yourself with the negotiation with that cop.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Thanks, I am glad to have your trust.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
So, where can I find him?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Let me talk to him and set a time and a place for you two to meet.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Why don’t you check with me tomorrow. I will let you know the details.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Sure. I am fine with that.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
See you tomorrow then.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Yeah, see you.
Quest: The Quest for Revenge_three

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Hello, Mr. Victor.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Jane, you are just in time. I was just having a chat with our hacker on the phone.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
That’s great. So, where does he want to meet me?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
There is a pub in the slum area, called \c[29]“Crazy Horses”\c[0]. Do you know it?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Can’t say that I do.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Well, it’s in the west from here, near the \c[13]Rundown Building\c[0] where \c[4]T-Dog\c[0] lives.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
The location should also be marked on your \c[6]Map\c[0] as well.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I am sure I will find it. Is this where he wants to meet?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Yeah. That's right.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
He will be there in the \c[13]Evening\c[0], waiting for you.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I suppose I will go there then.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
And how would I recognize him?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
He is a barely eighteen, skinny looking kid. Probably he will be the only one that young in that pub.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Really?! Is he even allowed there?
(\c[23]Jane asked in a surprised tone.\c[0])

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
This is the slum. No one bothers with things like that.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Which makes it a perfect place for having a private conversation.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
No one will look twice at you guys.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Well...er...I guess it’s not entirely true though.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
What do you mean?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
I mean, people might give some extra attention to you. So be prepared for that.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well, I suppose it can’t be helped. It’s a pub after all. People will probably try to hit on me.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
But I have enough experience with things like that. So I will be fine.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
If you are picturing it like any other pub, then you are in for a surprise.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
People here can be a little...er...how do I put it...a little handful.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
But I’m sure you can handle it just fine. You have already proven that much.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I will try my best to live up to your expectations.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
I have no doubt about it.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
So anyway, do you have any other questions about the whole thing?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Not necessarily, no.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well, I guess I can use some advice as to how best to deal with that hacker of yours.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
He is basically a kid, and also a nerd.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
So I don’t think he has much experience with girls.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Especially with someone as beautiful as you.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Umm, thanks, I guess.
(\c[23]She said, looking very embarrassed from all those compliments.\c[0])

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
So, if you can use your womanly charm properly, then who knows, he might even work for us for free.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Using my womanly charm, huh? I think I know what you mean.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Well, in the end, it is up to you, how you wanna deal with it.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Thanks for your advice. I will keep it in mind.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Anyway, I think I have taken enough of your time. So I will take my leave.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Alright. And good luck.

\c[1]Mr. Marcus:\c[0]
Have you talked to the hacker yet?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yes, I did. But I haven’t come to an agreement yet.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
But I am working on it.

\c[1]Mr. Marcus:\c[0]
Sure. Do your best.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Hello, Mr. Victor.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Jane, what's up?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
The hacker you sent me to, is using his computer magic to collect sensitive information from their private server.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
That's great news!

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah. But he needs to be paid before he will give us anything.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
I know. He already sent me the bill.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
And it's a pretty hefty sum of money!

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I am sorry, boss.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I tried my best but couldn't make him take any less than that.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
I am sure you did.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
The fact that he agreed to even take on this job is pretty unbelievable.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
He is usually quite shifty and refuses to take any job if he smells anything dangerous.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
So I am impressed that you managed to convince him despite the high-risk nature of the job.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well, it wasn't easy.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
But I somehow managed to do it.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
That's good.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Now then, let's talk about something more important.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
When it comes to taking revenge for this giant corporation's wrongdoing, we are partners in crime.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
And partners share everything.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Which means, half of the money that I'm paying will come from your pocket.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
What?!

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
B-But...

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Don't worry, I will pay the total amount for now.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
But you will need to pay me back later.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Thanks. I really appreciate it.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Right now, my financial situation is not very stable.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
So it would have been difficult for me.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
I am well aware of it.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
But it will change very soon.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Really?! Why do you think that?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Because, from now on, you are a full member of my gang.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
This means you will get to work jobs that pay more than before.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Really?!

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Of course. You have already proven yourself to be worthy of it.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
So, welcome aboard.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Thank you Mr. Victor. You won't regret it.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
I hope so.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
And if you need to make some money right now, I have a suggestion for you.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Of course. Please tell me.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Then talk to the Madame of the nearby brothel.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Tell her that I sent you.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Are you talking about Charlotte?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
So you already know her?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
We have met before.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
More importantly, you want me to work as a prostitute?

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Why would I...

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Oh, I see.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
That's a reasonable conclusion to make.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
And you can work as a prostitute if you want.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
But no, I had something else in mind.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
The Madame is looking for a bartender.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Bartender? In a brothel?
(\c[23]She asked, looking confused.\c[0])

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
There's a mini bar where clients wait before meeting the girls.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
She needs someone to tend to it.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Think you can do it?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I don't see why not.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I will talk to her about it.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
Well then, that concludes our business for today.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
And once that hacker guy sends all the information, I will have some of my guys look into it.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
To see if we can use anything against them.

\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]
I will let you know if they find anything.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Alright. See you later.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
T-Dog is calling me.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I wonder why.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Hello?

\c[2]T-Dog:\c[0]
What’s up bitch?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Not much. What do you want?

\c[2]T-Dog:\c[0]
Heard you got promoted?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yep, I did.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Now you can’t boss me around anymore.

\c[2]T-Dog:\c[0]
Don’t get too cocky.

\c[2]T-Dog:\c[0]
Even if you are a full member, I’m still your senior.

\c[2]T-Dog:\c[0]
Don’t forget that.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah, yeah, sure.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
If there’s nothing else, I am hanging up.

\c[2]T-Dog:\c[0]
Hold on, I am not done yet.

\c[2]T-Dog:\c[0]
Come see me in my room.

\c[2]T-Dog:\c[0]
There’s something I need to talk to you about.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Do I have to?

\c[2]T-Dog:\c[0]
Of course you do.

\c[2]T-Dog:\c[0]
Now hurry and bring your ass down here.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Fine, sure.
Quest: The Quest for Revenge_Four

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Hello Mr. Victor, you wanted to see me?

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Just got a call for T-Dog. Seems like you finished your first serious job with flying colors.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Yeah, it was really nerve-wracking! I was paranoid about getting caught the whole time.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Hope you’re not second guessing about working for me?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Nope. I’m completely committed to it.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Good to know.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Because now that you are a part of the family, there’s no turning back.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Yeah, I know.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
But if you keep pulling off wins like this, there's a bright future for you.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Thanks. I'll do my best.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Anyway, there's something I need to bring up.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Next time, don't have sex with the client without giving me a heads up.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
How did you…

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
It should be obvious by now that I know everything that goes around here.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Especially stuff that involves me.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I…I am sorry…

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Don’t get me wrong, I’m not against you having sex.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Fuck whoever you want. but…

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I get it. It wasn't the right time or place for that kind of thing.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
That’s not it.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
If I knew you were up for getting cozy with the client, I could have used it to sweeten the deal.
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< That's what he was getting at!\c[0])

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
So going forward, do you expect me to sleep with the clients?

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Only if I get some benefit out of it.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
And what if I don't want to? Can I refuse?

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Obviously. You don't even need to ask me that.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
But let's be real, you're already working as a prostitute, so why say no?
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< He already knows that I started working at the brothel.\c[0])

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Well, I like having a choice. I don't want to feel pressured into it.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
But you are right. I probably won’t refuse.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Alright, now that we got that sorted, let's get down to why I asked you here.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
My people went through all the information the hacker kid gathered for us.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Please tell me you found something useful.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
I wish I could say that. But unfortunately no such luck.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
There's nothing incriminating we can use against them.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
How can that be?!

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
They got smart, it seems. Probably because one of their former employees almost blew the whistle.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
You mean me?

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
You and that other kid that tried to do the same thing.
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< He is probably talking about Tomas. He is the guy who told me about Mr. Victor.\c[0])
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< I wonder what he's up to these days.\c[0])

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Because of that, they got paranoid and completely scrub anything sensitive off their online server.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
They realized that stuff on the internet can get hacked at any moment.Mr. Victor: They realized that stuff on the internet can get hacked at any moment.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
So all the trouble we went through to get that info was for nothing?

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Well, that’s how things work sometimes. You don’t always get what you want.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
But don't throw in the towel just yet.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Really?! So there’s still a way…

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Don’t get too excited just yet. There’s still a lot of unknowns.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
I guess I should break it down for you.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Even though we didn't find any smoking gun, we stumbled upon a personal email chain between CEO Mr. Albert and his wife Samantha.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Now, I don't have the time or energy to spill all the details from those emails.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
So let me give you the lowdown.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Turns out, the CEO and his wife have been separated for nearly two years.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
And the reason for their separation is because of the disagreement on how to run the company.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Surprisingly, the wife is a better person than her husband.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
She didn't like how he was cutting corners to boost profits.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
She called him out, asked him to stop, but he shrugged it off.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
He even kicked her off the board of directors to keep her out of the way.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
So the relationship between Mr. Albert and his wife is very sour right now. But how’s that gonna help us with anything?

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
I want you to meet with the wife and persuade her to work with us.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
She must know a thing or two about her husband that we could use to bring him down.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
You really think she'd go for that?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Even if she despises him, it's a stretch to think she'd join forces with a bunch of criminals.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
I'm confident you can make it happen.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
You're putting a lot of faith in me.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Because I know you've got what it takes. Believe in yourself.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Thanks for the word of encouragement.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I guess I’ll see what I can do.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Although, convincing her would have been much easier if she was a guy.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Don’t sell yourself short. You are attractive enough for even ladies to fall for you.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Oh, please, enough! You're making me blush.
(\c[23]Though her happy expression contradicted her words.\c[0])

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Jane, I don't throw compliments around lightly. I mean every word.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
That being said, whether you seduce her or use any other method is up to you.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Alright. I’ll give it my best shot.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
But how do I get in touch with her? Do you have her contact info?

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Yes. We manage to get it from one of the emails. Let me send it to your phone.
MessageRows 1
MessageWidth 600
\><CENTER>He sent Jane her contact information.
MessageWidth 815
MessageRows 4

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Also sent you one of her photos. So you’ll have no problem recognising her.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Alright then, I’ll give her a call and see if I could set-up a meeting with her.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Good luck, and keep me posted.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Will do.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Let’s give her a call right now.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Who is this?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Hey there, you might not know me, but I'm Jane. I used to be part of your husband's company.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
You are right. I don’t know you. So mind telling me how you got hold of my personal cell number?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Well…I got it from someone.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
What’s that supposed to mean?

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Only people very close to me have my personal number. So I would like to know from which “someone” you get it.
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< Man! She is really persistent about that!\c[0])

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Fine, I’ll tell you how I got your number.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
But before that, there's something I need to talk to you about.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
(Sigh) Looks like I don't have a choice.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Fine, since I've got some time on my hands, go ahead. What's on your mind?
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< Quite the attitude. Expected from a CEO's wife.\c[0])

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I know that you and your husband have been separated for two years.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
How do you know that?!

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Not even my parents are aware of it!
(\c[23]She exclaimed in a very shocked voice.\c[0])

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Not just that, I also know about all the shady business practices happening in your husband's company.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
From bribing officials to using subpar raw materials, employing underhanded tactics to eliminate the competition, and so on.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Why are you telling me all this?

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Are you trying to blackmail me? If so, you've got the wrong person.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
No, not at all. I'm not trying to blackmail you.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
In fact, I want your help.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Help with what?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
With removing your husband from the company.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Why would I help you with that?

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Despite being separated, I'm still married to him.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Why would I go against my husband?
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< I expected that response from her.\c[0])
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< Even if she hates his gut, she’s not just gonna agree to work with some stranger she hasn't even met before.\c[0])

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Because I know you're not okay with how he's running the company.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I also know you tried to stop him but couldn't, leading to your removal from the board of directors.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Who the hell are you?! How do you know all this?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I am happy to answer all that. But not over the phone.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
How about we meet in person?
(\c[23]She fell silent, clearly contemplating her decision.\c[0])

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Alright.
(\c[23]She responded after a lengthy pause.\c[0])

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
But only if it’s somewhere public.
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< Seems like she's still wary of me.\c[0])
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< Can't blame her; I did come off as some shady character with inside info about her life.\c[0])

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
No problem.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Any specific place you have in mind for our meet-up?
(\c[23]Jane decided to let her take charge to make her feel more in control.\c[0])

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
We can meet at that popular \c[13]Cafe\c[0] in \c[14]Downtown\c[0].

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Let’s meet in the \c[13]Afternoon\c[0]. This is when I’ll be free.
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< Opting for a busy place for our meeting. She's definitely cautious.\c[0])

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Alright. I’ll be there.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
How will I recognize you?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
No need to worry about that. I'll find you.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
You just make sure to be there in time.

\>\c[2]Samantha:\c[0]\<
Yeah, I’ll be there.
MessageRows 3
\><CENTER>Go to the \c[13]Cafe\c[0] located \c[14]Downtown\c[0] in the \c[16]Afternoon\c[0].
\>You can look up the location of the Cafe by opening
\>the \c[14]Map\c[0] while in Downtown.
MessageRows 4

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Hey Boss, I have some good news to share.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
I assume the meeting with the wife went well?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Yeah, very.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Alright. Tell me the details.
\><CENTER>Jane gave him a brief summary of their conversation.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Hmm…interesting.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
So she wants you to get some evidence of her husband cheating.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Yeah. Can you help me with that?

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Of course I can. Did you forget who you work for? We do this kind of stuff for a living.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Collecting dirt on rich and powerful people so that we can extort and blackmail them later is right in our wheelhouse.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
That’s great!

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Well, not much for the people you extort, but definitely for me.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Is there anything I could do to help?

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
I have a guy who's an expert in this area. Chat with him about the details.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Where can I find him?

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
You probably passed him coming in. Usually stationed behind a desk downstairs.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I think I know who you are talking about. I’ll go have a chat with him right now.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
You do that.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
And, as always, keep me in the loop.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Absolutely.
Quest: The Quest for Revenge_Five

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Hello, Boss...

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
It’s been a while since we last talked.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Yeah, I’ve been busy with—

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
I know. Owen’s been keeping me updated.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
So, I guess you’re aware of everything, then.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
I know you managed to get a sex tape of your former boss. Well done.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Thanks, Boss. I couldn’t have done it without your men.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
That's fine.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
And since you’re here talking to me, I assume there have been some major developments?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Yes. Using the tape as leverage, his wife kicked him out of the company.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
I see.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
So, that’s it then. You finally got your revenge.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
How do you feel?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I don’t know... I feel... kinda empty.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Taking down the man I hated for so long didn’t make me as happy as I thought it would.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Maybe because it’s been so long since he fired me... My hatred faded a little.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Maybe. Or maybe you’ve been enjoying your new life so much that you stopped blaming him for how things turned out.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
That... might be true.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
So, what’s next for you?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
What do you mean?
(\c[23]She asked, slightly confused by his question.\c[0])

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Would you continue to work for me?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I thought once I joined your gang, there was no leaving?

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Normally, yes. But I took a liking to you, so I’m making an exception.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Besides, you only joined to get revenge on your boss.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Now that it’s done, you have no real reason to stay.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
And I don’t keep people around who aren’t motivated to be here.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Unless, of course, you actually started enjoying the work.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
So... is that the case?
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< Do I like working for him?\c[0])
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< ...I guess, in some ways, I do.\c[0])
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< But that doesn’t mean I should keep living as a criminal when I’ve got such a big opportunity waiting for me.\c[0])
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< Working for Samantha would set me up for life.\c[0])
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< But do I really want to go back to being a corporate drone?\c[0])

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I... I don’t know for sure. Can I have some time to think it over?

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Of course. Let me know once you’ve made up your mind.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I will.
Quest: A New Begining

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Hello, Mr. Victor...

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
You're here. So, have you finally decided?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Yes, I have.
Choice

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
What's your choice? Staying with us, or going back to your old job?
\c[27]Work for Mr. Victor
\c[3]Take Samantha's offer
\c[27]Work for Mr. Victor

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I’m staying with you.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Really? I thought you’d be tempted by the perks—stock options, health plans, no dodging bullets. Why stay in this game?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Sure, it’s safer there, but it’s soulless. I was just a cog, doing what I’m told, feeling empty. That’s not me.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Empty, huh? Most people would jump at that kind of stability, Jane.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Not my thing. I don’t belong in some glass office. I’m made for the streets.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Well, you certainly do dress like someone that belongs on the street.
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< Did he just call me a slut?\c[0])

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Er... thanks?

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Don’t mention it.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
So, this is your final decision? There’s no going back after that.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Yes, it is.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Then welcome to the team. For good this time.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Thanks. I’m looking forward to working for you.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Good. Go home for now. We’ll talk about your role in the gang tomorrow.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Sounds good. I’ll be here.
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< Alright, time to meet with Samantha and let her know about my decision.\c[0])
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< But before that, I need to talk to \c[14]Alex\c[23] first.\c[0])

Choice
\c[3]Take Samantha's offer

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I’ve decided to take Samantha’s offer. I’ll be joining her company.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Make sense. Why stay tangled in this world when you’ve got a better path ahead?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Yeah. This line of work... it’s never really been me. I only stuck it out this long to settle my score with my former boss.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Now that this is behind me, I just can’t motivate myself to keep working here.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
I get it. You’ve fought your battles, and now you’re ready for something new. I wish you nothing but success, Jane.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Thank you, truly.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
And... I owe you a lot. For everything you’ve done for me.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
All I did was give you a nudge. You carried the weight yourself. Besides, I had my own reasons for wanting your old boss taken down.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Let’s call it a mutual favor.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Fair enough. I can live with that.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Well, I guess this is it. Time for me to move on.

\>\c[2]Mr. Victor:\c[0]\<
Make sure to say your goodbyes to Owen and T-Dog before leaving.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I sure will.
Choice
